prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, a single-point calculation was performed at this fixed geometry. SCF converged.

HOMO = -6.3597638 eV, LUMO = -0.1024036 eV → **gap ≈ 6.2573602 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap).
No warnings were reported.
